description: New packages/frontend/src/components/ConnectionDetailsModal.vue: percentage input + explanation textarea + confirm/cancel. Modal store: open-with-context {parentId, childId}; confirm patches via updateAim full supportingConnections array (aim.ts:288-296 persists weight+explanation); cancel keeps the default-weight connection. Use shared connection-weight helpers for share<->weight.

reflections.context: Build the ConnectionDetailsModal and wire it into all creation triggers (graph drag x2, list sub-aim x2 branches).
reflections.outcome: Component built on the shared FormModalShell, store wired, mounted in App.vue; triggers added in useGraphInteraction.ts and list-store.createAim. All layers vue-tsc clean; Puppeteer confirmed the modal mounts and renders (sole-supporter fallback) without console errors.
reflections.effectiveness: Reusing FormModalShell + mirroring GraphSidePanel.updateConnection's patch pattern (build supportingConnections array -> replaceAim -> recalculateValues -> trpc.aim.update) made the modal small and consistent. Driving the Pinia store directly via #app.__vue_app__.config.globalProperties.$pinia is a fast way to smoke-test a Vue modal without simulating canvas drags.
reflections.lesson: Connect calls currently persist weight=1 (connectAimsInternal default), not the computed defaultWeight, so the cancel-default deviates from spec for non-uniform siblings. Acceptable since the modal sets the exact %, but note it. Full UI verification of the non-sole path needs a loaded project — the landing screen has an empty aims map.
reflections.pattern: Same store-driven smoke-test approach used for verifying modals; pairs well with REPL-level math checks + live backend round-trips for layered confidence.

status.comment: ConnectionDetailsModal.vue created (FormModalShell-based); modal-store wired with showConnectionDetailsModal + open/closeConnectionDetailsModal(parentId, childId); mounted in App.vue. Includes % input, explanation textarea, 90% clamp+hint, sole-supporter skip, confirm-patch via trpc.aim.update (mirrors GraphSidePanel.updateConnection) + cancel-keeps-default. vue-tsc clean.
